subject: [PATCH v2 03/14] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE accessors to uffd

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch renames kernel-internal functions and variables related to the uffd-wp PTE bit, which is used for write protection and access tracking in Userfaultfd (UFD). The renaming is done to reflect that the bit's meaning now depends on the VMA flag (WP or RWP), not its name. This change does not affect the behavior of the kernel but makes the code more consistent and easier to understand. The patch includes a series of mechanical renames across various files in the Linux kernel source tree, including header files, C files, and inline functions.
